title: Bisikan dari Proyektor Usang
theme: Menjelajahi kecemasan tersembunyi yang muncul saat seseorang menghadapi artefak masa lalu, memicu ingatan yang lama terkubur.

cover.prompt: Interior of a grand, serene national archives museum. Immense, orderly shelves filled with historical documents, wrapped in aged brown paper and clear protective covers. The atmosphere is profoundly still, with a sense of time standing gentle. Soft, natural light streams in through unseen windows, highlighting the aged textures of paper and creating a gentle glow. Composition focuses on the expansive perspective of the aisles between the tall archive shelves, inviting contemplation. The overall mood is one of quiet discovery and historical preservation.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Andini, a graphic designer, discovers a vintage film projector in an old archive museum. Upon touching it, she experiences vivid memory flashes and unsettling whispers, linking her to a past tragedy involving a disappeared cinematographer and an unfinished film. Overwhelmed by the psychological connection, she decides to investigate further, seeking peace for herself and the potential soul tied to the artifact.
